subcodes.first_line: O dear one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The wondrous verses were the mysteries of an illumined heart, sweet indeed to the taste and palate of spiritual souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء اشعار بدیع اسرار قلب منیر بود مذاق روحانیان را شکر است و کام
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry
